hero.title:
Melbourne's Premium
Cabinet Maker
hero.intro: Design your dream kitchen online. Choose finishes, see your price instantly, and book a free video consultation with our design team.

introduction.heading: Custom Joinery, Built for Melbourne Homes
introduction.body: For over a decade, Master Cabinet has been crafting premium kitchens, laundries, wardrobes, and custom joinery for Melbourne homeowners. From concept to installation, every piece is designed in-house and built by our team of experienced cabinet makers.

ctaBand.heading: Book Your Free Video Consultation
ctaBand.body: Meet with our design team over Zoom. We'll discuss your vision, show you material samples digitally, and provide a detailed quote — all from the comfort of your home.

seo.title: Master Cabinet | Premium Custom Cabinetry Melbourne
seo.description: Design your dream kitchen online with Master Cabinet. Australian-made custom cabinetry, instant ballpark pricing, and free video consultations. Melbourne-based.
